headings.usage: All section titles, modal headers, and key metric numbers. Transform to uppercase for top-level headers.

body.usage: General text, inputs, table data, and descriptions.

mono.usage: SKUs, Order IDs, Pricing, and Inventory Counts.

primary.name: Industrial Slate
primary.usage: Main navigation, heavy text, primary borders.

accent.name: Safety Orange
accent.usage: Primary CTAs (Add to Cart, Checkout), Alerts, Active States.

visual_enhancers.borders: 2px solid slate-300 (border-2). No hairline 1px borders. Things need to look durable.
visual_enhancers.shadows: None or 'Hard' shadows only (e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(15,23,42,1)]). Avoid soft diffuse shadows.
visual_enhancers.rounded: rounded-sm (2px) or rounded-md (4px). Avoid fully rounded 'pill' shapes unless it's a status tag.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay on the sidebar or header to simulate 'grit'.

buttons.primary: bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-600 text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-sm shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(15,23,42,1)] active:translate-y-[1px] active:shadow-none transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-slate-900 text-slate-900 font-bold hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-sm

cards.style: bg-white border-2 border-slate-200 rounded-md p-6. Header sections should have a bottom border.

inputs.style: h-12 border-2 border-slate-300 bg-white focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-0 rounded-sm text-lg font-manrope placeholder:text-slate-400

pos_grid.item: Aspect ratio 1/1 or 4/3. Image takes up 60%. Title and Price heavily emphasized below. Big 'Add' button overlay.

pos_screen.left_panel: Cart/Order Summary. Fixed width (e.g., w-1/3). High contrast background (white).
pos_screen.right_panel: Product Grid. Scrollable. Search bar fixed at top. Grid cols 3 or 4 depending on screen.
pos_screen.mobile_adapt: Stack panels. Tabs to switch between 'Scan/Search' and 'Cart'.

dashboard.widgets: Sales Overview (Large), Low Stock Alert (Tall), Top Sellers (Square).

inventory_list.style: Zebra striping optional. Monospace font for Numbers. Status badges solid colors.

motion.micro_interactions: Buttons press down (scale-95) on click. List items slide in from bottom (staggered).

instructions_to_main_agent.font_setup: Import 'Barlow Condensed' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts immediately in index.css.
instructions_to_main_agent.theme_setup: Extend tailwind.config.js with the 'workshop' color palette and border widths.
instructions_to_main_agent.component_usage: Use Shadcn components but OVERRIDE the default 'radius-lg' and 'border-border' to match the industrial 2px border style. Do not use the default soft look.
instructions_to_main_agent.pos_logic: Ensure the POS cart updates instantly. Use optimisitic UI. No loading spinners for adding items.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: Add data-testid to every interactive element (buttons, inputs, grid items). format: 'section-element-action' (e.g., 'pos-product-card-add').

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle noise.
Make text larger than usual. Store environments have distractions.
Inputs must be large (h-12 minimum) for touch targets.
Use Sonner for toasts, positioned top-center for visibility.
